name: evo-agent-team
description: Real-time dashboard for monitoring Claude Code agent teams
author: Claude Code Contributors

hooks.description: Auto-start the evo-agent-team server when a team is created

skills.name: evo-team:status
skills.description: Check if the evo-agent-team dashboard server is running and retrieve its status

skills.name: evo-team:open
skills.description: Open the evo-agent-team dashboard in your default web browser
